/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/APIRoutes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/ConnectionHandlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/K8sHandlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/OIDCValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/OpenShiftClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmc_server.dir/src/Core/Utils.cpp.o -o nmc_server   -L/home/pbisaacs/Developer/neuralmimicry/nmc/nmc_server/build_fresh/_deps/libyaml_project-install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pbisaacs/Developer/neuralmimicry/nmc/nmc_server/build_fresh/_deps/libyaml_project-install/lib -Wl,--whole-archive _deps/kubernetes_client_c_ext-build/libkubernetes.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libwebsockets.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so _deps/zstd-install/lib/libzstd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lyaml /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libwebsockets.so.19 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcap.so -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.10.1.0
